justification: The diff performs a comprehensive Jakarta EE namespace migration (javax -> jakarta) and upgrades dependencies (Spring 6, Hibernate 6, Jakarta Servlet 6) correctly. It uses modern Java 21 features like pattern matching for instanceof (SessionValidator.java) and @Serial for serialVersionUID (Contract.java, etc.), and removes deprecated @Autowired in favor of constructor injection. However, the java.version property is set to 17 instead of 21, and some generated WS files have future timestamps (2026) which is odd but likely a tool artifact.
